## Validation

- [ ] Focused tests pass
- [ ] `make check` passes

## Public-safety review

- [ ] No credentials, private paths, identifiers, logs, real dwelling data, or real-world media
- [ ] Fixtures and visible demo data are explicitly synthetic
- [ ] Documentation and capability claims match the evidence
